title: artplants.de Artificial bunch Reed grass RUMENG with panicles, cream, 24"/60 cm - Artificial bouquet
features: Artificial bouquet by artplants from the collection RUMENG

description: Important information from artplants.de: If you have any questions about our products, tips for decoration and much more, we are also happy to help you by phone and email. For further contact information, please click on our seller name. All product information and availability are subject to errors and changes. Pictures may be similar in the representation of the product and in the colouring. Delivery without decoration (unless otherwise mentioned). Dimensions and weights given may vary slightly due to manufacturing. Note that some artificial plants (or quantities) require fire protection treatment in certain rooms. Products comply with B3 according to DIN4102-1 - observe individual regulations. For long-lasting colour fidelity, optional treatment with UV protection spray is recommended at regular intervals. The need for repetition depends on the location. Due to the many factors that vary from place to place, we cannot guarantee the hardiness of the plants.
